rationale: Review 1 correctly identifies that the two new imports in TauCeti.lean violate alphabetical ordering: `NumberTheory.Multiquadratic.SquareClass` is placed before `FieldTheory.IntermediateField.Quadratic` (N after F), and before `NumberTheory.EffectiveBounds.*` (Multiquadratic after EffectiveBounds). Both violations are directly confirmed in the diff. Acting on Review 1 fixes a real, verifiable ordering issue that maintainers would want corrected; Review 2 misses it entirely.
